name: emmy-planning-context
description: Ambient Emmy Goals Space context loading, requirements context and interpretation, approved planning ingestion, authorized Planning Log appends, and approval-gated FFS Jira ticketing.

interface.shortDescription: Use Emmy goals to ground planning.
interface.longDescription: Adds Confluence-backed workflows for loading current Emmy strategic principles, active delivery goals, outcomes, applicable planning requirements, interpreting requirement language without writing, ingesting approved planning principles and goals from text or local files, appending approved Planning Log entries, and drafting or creating FFS Jira tickets after explicit approval.
defaultPrompt: Ground this Emmy planning task in current goals.
Load applicable Emmy requirements before planning work.
Interpret this Emmy requirement source without writing.
Ingest these Emmy principles and goals.
Append the approved Emmy planning log entry.
Draft an FFS Jira ticket following Emmy conventions.
